text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I want to make everyone happy with my racing!
Just like sumo stew does! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Let's invite everyone for some sumo
stew! It'll be super nutritious, jam-packed with
ingredients, and completely buono! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
